description: Agent Zero Wallet Bridge — CLI bridge script that lets Agent Zero (Python AI) provision a Squads v4 wallet, fund it, and execute x402-paid MCP tools via JSON-in/JSON-out terminal commands. Also updates demo.ts with provision step as fallback.

userStories.title: Bridge script CLI skeleton with provision subcommand
userStories.description: Create scripts/agent-zero-bridge.ts that accepts a subcommand as first argument. Implement 'provision' subcommand that calls provisionAgentWallet() from @swigpay/agent-wallet and outputs JSON with multisigPda, vaultPda, spendingLimitPda, vaultUsdcAta. Uses existing loadKeypairFromBase58 pattern from scripts/provision-agent.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/agent-zero-bridge.ts exists with shebang-style tsx compatibility
pnpm tsx scripts/agent-zero-bridge.ts provision outputs valid JSON to stdout
JSON output contains keys: multisigPda, vaultPda, spendingLimitPda, vaultUsdcAta, agentAddress
Errors go to stderr, not stdout (so Agent Zero can parse stdout safely)
userStories.notes: Read scripts/provision-agent.ts for exact import patterns. Use AGENT_PRIVATE_KEY_BASE58 and HUMAN_PRIVATE_KEY_BASE58 from .env. SQUADS_DAILY_LIMIT_USDC defaults to 1.0.

userStories.title: Bridge fund subcommand
userStories.description: Add 'fund' subcommand to bridge that transfers USDC from agent wallet to vault USDC ATA. Reuses logic from scripts/fund-vault.ts. Outputs JSON with vaultUsdcAta, amountUsdc, txHash, explorerUrl.
acceptanceCriteria: pnpm tsx scripts/agent-zero-bridge.ts fund outputs valid JSON to stdout
JSON output contains keys: vaultUsdcAta, amountUsdc, txHash, explorerUrl
Amount defaults to 5.0 USDC, overridable via --amount flag
userStories.notes: Read scripts/fund-vault.ts for exact transfer logic. Use getUsdcAssociatedTokenAddress with allowOwnerOffCurve=true for vault ATA (see progress.txt Codebase Patterns).

userStories.title: Bridge list-tools subcommand
userStories.description: Add 'list-tools' subcommand that connects to MCP server using createSwigPayClient from @swigpay/agent-wallet and outputs tool names + descriptions as JSON array.
acceptanceCriteria: pnpm tsx scripts/agent-zero-bridge.ts list-tools outputs JSON array to stdout
Each element has keys: name, description
Uses createSwigPayClient with agentConfig built from .env vars
userStories.notes: See agents/demo.ts lines 58-69 for exact client creation pattern. Build AgentConfig from env vars same as demo.ts lines 37-49.
